revision.text:
{{#switch: {{#ifexpr: {{#time:U}}-{{#time:U| {{{1|}}}}} < 12*60 | 0 | {{#expr: trunc( 1.4427 * ln( ({{#time:U}}-{{#time:U| {{{1}}}}})) - 9.3987) }} }} |0 |1 |2 |3 = {{#time: G:i|{{{1|}}} }} ({{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/60 round 0 }} minutes ago) |4 |5 = {{#time: G:i|{{{1|}}} }} ({{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/3600 round 1 }} hours ago) |6 |7 = {{#time: G:i|{{{1|}}} }} ({{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/3600 round 0 }} hours ago) |8 = {{#time: G:i|{{{1|}}} }} (Yesterday) |9 |10 = {{#time: G:i|{{{1|}}} }} ({{#time:l|{{{1|}}}}}) |default= {{#time: g:i A j F Y "(UTC)"|{{{1|}}} }} }} {{documentation|content= == test cases == * {{Time ago|-14 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-14 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-33 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-33 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-123 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-123 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-500 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-500 minutes}} * {{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}} }}

{{#switch: {{#ifexpr: abs({{#time:U}}-{{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}}) < 180 | 0 | {{#expr: trunc( 1.4427 * ln( ({{#time:U}}-{{#time:U|{{{1}}}}})) - 7.3987) }} }} |0 = less than 3 minutes ago |1 |2 = {{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/60 round 0 }} minutes ago |3 |4 |5 = {{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/12 round 0 * 5}} minutes ago |6 |7 = {{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/3600 round 1 }} hours ago |8 |9 = {{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/3600 round 0 }} hours ago |10 = Yesterday |11 |12 = {{#time:l|{{{1|}}}}} |default= {{#expr: ({{#time:U}} - {{#time:U|{{{1|}}}}})/604800 round 0 }} weeks ago }} {{documentation|content= {{tl|{{PAGENAME}}}} calculates dates and times since an event has passed. == Examples == * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-14 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-14 minutes}} * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-134 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-123 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-500 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-500 minutes}} * {{Time ago|Jan 21, 2001 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Jan 21 2001 3:45 PM}} * {{Time ago|Oct 18 2008}}
→{{Time ago|Oct 18 2008 }} * {{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}} }}

{{#switch: {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 60 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 3600 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 86400 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 2678400 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ | 0 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} seconds | 1 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} minutes | 2 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} hours | 3 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} days | 4 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} months }}{{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) | ago | ' time }} {{documentation|content= {{tl|{{PAGENAME}}}} calculates dates and times since an event has passed. == Examples == * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-14 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-14 minutes}} * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-134 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-123 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-500 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-500 minutes}} * {{Time ago|Jan 21, 2001 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Jan 21 2001 3:45 PM}} * {{Time ago|Oct 18 2008}}
→{{Time ago|Oct 18 2008 }} * {{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}} }}

{{#switch: {{#expr: {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 60 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 3600 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 86400 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ {{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) / 2678400 round 0 | 1 | 0 }}+ }} | 0 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} seconds | 1 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} minutes | 2 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} hours | 3 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} days | 4 = {{#expr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) }} months }}{{#ifexpr: abs( {{#time:U}} - {{#time:U| {{{1|}}} }} ) | ago | ' time }} {{documentation|content= {{tl|{{PAGENAME}}}} calculates dates and times since an event has passed. == Examples == * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-14 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-14 minutes}} * {{Time ago|{{#time: r |-134 minutes}}}}
→{{Time ago|-123 minutes}} * {{Time ago|-500 minutes}}
→{{Time ago|-500 minutes}} * {{Time ago|Jan 21, 2001 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Jan 21 2001 3:45 PM}} * {{Time ago|Oct 18 2008}}
→{{Time ago|Oct 18 2008 }} * {{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}}
→{{Time ago|Nov 7 2008 3:45 PM}} }}

revision.comment: use of unit before using next highest unit, see talk
Changed protection level for "[[Template:Time ago]]": reduce to semi, per request ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
xxx ago for past time, xxxs' time for future
recode, and support for min_magnitude parameter

Changed protection level of Template:Time ago: [[WP:HRT|Highly visible template]] on [[Wikipedia:Database reports/Unprotected templates with many transclusions/1]]. Changes can be requested at [[WP:RFUP]] using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [mov

Changed protection level of Template:Time ago: restoring semi-protection per ANI discussion. Requests for changes of prot level to [[WP:RfPP]]. using [[WP:TW|TW]] ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Time ago: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
Changed protection level of Template:Time ago: allow template editors ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))

revision.text: {{#invoke:TimeAgo|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go in the /doc subpage and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Pointing to new module name after [[Template_talk:Time_ago#Requested_move_30_October_2019|RM]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Time Ago|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go in the /doc subpage and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
{{#invoke:Time ago|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go in the /doc subpage and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Time ago]]": Highly visible template ([Edit=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (expires 09:02, 26 November 2024 (UTC)) [Move=Allow only autoconfirmed users] (expires 09:02, 26 November 2024 (UTC)))

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Time ago|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go in the /doc subpage and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:Time ago|main}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go in the /doc subpage and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
